segments.text: Listen now to what Yahweh says:
Arise, plead your case before the mountains, and let the hills hear what you have to say.
segments.speaker: Yahweh
Yahweh

segments.text:
My people, what have I done to you? How have I burdened you?
Answer me!
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
For I brought you up out of the land of Egypt, and redeemed you out of the house of bondage. 
I sent before you Moses, Aaron, and Miriam.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
My people, remember now what Balak king of Moab devised, and what Balaam the son of Beor answered him from Shittim to Gilgal, 
that you may know the righteous acts of Yahweh.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: How shall I come before Yahweh, and bow myself before the exalted God? Shall I come before him with burnt offerings, with calves a year old?
Will Yahweh be pleased with thousands of rams? With tens of thousands of rivers of oil? Shall I give my firstborn for my disobedience? The fruit of my body for the sin of my soul?
He has shown you, O man, what is good. What does Yahweh require of you, but to act justly,
to love mercy, and to walk humbly with your God?
Yahweh’s voice calls to the city—and wisdom fears your name—
Listen to the rod, and he who appointed it.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Are there yet treasures of wickedness in the house of the wicked, and a short ephah that is accursed?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Shall I tolerate dishonest scales, and a bag of deceitful weights?
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
Her rich men are full of violence, her inhabitants speak lies, 
and their tongue is deceitful in their speech.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text: Therefore I also have struck you with a grievous wound. I have made you desolate because of your sins.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
You shall eat, but not be satisfied. Your hunger will be within you. 
You will store up, but not save, 
and that which you save I will give up to the sword.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
You will sow, but won’t reap. You will tread the olives, but won’t anoint yourself with oil; 
and crush grapes, but won’t drink the wine.
segments.speaker: Yahweh

segments.text:
For the statutes of Omri are kept, and all the works of Ahab’s house. 
You walk in their counsels, 
that I may make you a ruin, 
and your inhabitants a hissing. 
You will bear the reproach of my people.
segments.speaker: Yahweh
